See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}."},"getSealedBids(bytes32)":{"params":{"_id":"Auction identifier."},"returns":{"_0":"bids Array of encrypted bids."}},"grantRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. cancelAuction(bytes32,address).details: Can cancel auctions in BIDDING, CLOSED, ERROR, or CANCELLED states (status < FINALISED && status != NONE).Cannot cancel auctions that are FINALISED or NONE.Sets auction status to CANCELLED.

params._caller: Expected to be the BondManager admin wallet.

returns.offering: The offering size of the cancelled auction.

closeAuction(bytes32,address).details: Bid phase is soft-enforced via timestamp but this function finalizes the phase transition.

params._caller: Expected to be the BondManager admin wallet.

returns._0: bids Array of encrypted bids captured during BIDDING.

constructor.details: BondManager is expected to claim AUCTION_ADMIN_ROLE post deployment.

createAuction(string,address,uint64,byte.details: First auction for an ISIN must be RATE type to set yield; subsequent auctions can be PRICE or BUYBACK.

params._auctionPubKey: Auctioneer public key used to unseal bids off-chain.
params._auctionType: Type of auction: RATE for initial bonds, PRICE for extensions.
params._bond: Address of the BondToken contract (same for all ISINs).
params._isin: ISIN for target bond (used as partition identifier).
params._offering: Total supply ceiling (offering size) for this partition.
params._owner: Address of the BondManager (auction admin) that can close/finalise.

eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

params._alloc: Clearing rate allocations sorted arbitrarily but priced uniformly.

returns._0: total Total units allocated across all bidders.
returns._1: clearingRate The shared rate (interest rate or price per 100) set by the marginal bid.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params._ciphertext: Packed ciphertext blob carrying wrapped keys + symmetric ciphertext.
params._plaintextHash: keccak256 hash of the plaintext payload.

returns.bidIndex: Index of the stored bid (used by clients for off-chain reconciliation).

auctionAllocations(bytes32,uint256).notice: Public posting of final allocations per auction ID (unsealed).

auctionBids(bytes32,uint256).notice: Sealed bids submitted during bid phase.

cancelAuction(bytes32,address).notice: Cancel an auction in any state except FINALISED.

closeAuction(bytes32,address).notice: Close an auction after the BondManager observes the off-chain timer expiry.

constructor.notice: Initializes the auction registry and grants DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE to the deployer.

createAuction(string,address,uint64,byte.notice: Create a new auction for a bond partition (ISIN) in the ERC1400 contract.

finaliseAuction(bytes32,address,(string,.notice: Finalize the active auction with off-chain computed uniform-rate allocations.

getAllocations(bytes32).notice: Return final allocations for auction ID.

getAuctionId(string).notice: Return the current auction ID for an ISIN.

getSealedBids(bytes32).notice: Return all sealed bids for auction ID so off-chain tooling can decrypt them.

isinToAuctionCount(string).notice: Auction count per ISIN to derive auction IDs.

submitBid(bytes32,bytes,bytes32).notice: Submit an encrypted bid for an active auction.
